original: This pair of otherwise tasteful black briefs comes with a roomy pouch on the front to support your endowments in a shapely, stylish way. No matter whether you’re endowed with a cute mini-pumpkin or a kui-tan’s stuffed candy-sack, the patented ultralastic fabric will cradle you comfortably. Fresh from JoyCo, this one is all treat, no tricks!
